name: Nuclear Waste
recipeIngredient: top up with one pint cider (or lager if you prefer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the measured amounts of Blue Curaçao and Bailey's Irish Cream.
2. Top off the mixture with one pint of cider (or lager, if preferred).
3. Stir gently until well combined.
The end result is a greenish-brown liquid with scummy bits floating in it and a thick layer of scum on top. It tastes wonderful, especially when chocolate bars are dunked in (referred to as Control Rods). The bar of preference is a Toffee Crisp, as the crisped rice pieces float around, making the drink look even more undesirable.
